name: 24"x36" Chenille Bath Rug Ivory with Black Boarder - Threshold™
description:
Add luxurious style and comfort to your bath space with this Oversized Modern Chenille Bath Rug from Threshold™. This oversized bath rug is crafted from cotton fabric to provide soft comfort underfoot every time you step out of the shower. Designed in black and white with a textured striped pattern, you can place the flat-pile rug by the tub or in front of the sink.

Threshold™: Looks like home, feels like you.
